meta_title: For Students: design with AI to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Design with AI to Solve No Portfolio (Checklist)
content.seo_description: Overcome the no-portfolio hurdle by leveraging AI. This beginner checklist uses Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional-grade software quickly.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap ends when you stop coding from scratch and start orchestrating AI. By using Antigravity for rapid UI design and Claude Code to handle complex logic, you can transform abstract ideas into production-ready SaaS projects in hours, building a high-impact portfolio that proves your engineering capability to employers.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the ultimate enemy. You have the degree, the ambition, and the curiosity, yet your GitHub is a graveyard of abandoned tutorials and 'Hello World' repositories. Employers aren't looking for textbook exercises; they are hunting for builders who can take a vague requirement and manifest a functional, polished product.

This is where the paradigm shifts. By integrating Antigravity’s rapid design capabilities with the raw coding power of Claude Code, you bypass the friction of boilerplate and focus on architecture. You aren't just writing code; you are becoming an AI-augmented engineer, capable of shipping high-value applications that turn 'no experience' into 'proven track record.'

steps.title: Define the Value Proposition
steps.description: Identify a specific pain point in a niche industry. Avoid generic clones; build a tool that solves one problem exceptionally well.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-fidelity landing page wireframe for a SaaS tool that automates [Insert Niche] workflows. Focus on a clean, modern dashboard layout using Tailwind CSS.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize a new Next.js project with Tailwind CSS and outline the core directory structure'

steps.title: Architect the Database Schema
steps.description: Define your data model early to ensure scalability. Good schema design is the difference between a toy and a product.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a PostgreSQL schema for a [Insert App Type] including users, subscriptions, and data logs. Use Prisma syntax.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a schema.prisma file based on the generated data model and run migrations'

steps.title: Build the Core Logic Engine
steps.description: Use Claude Code to implement the critical business logic that differentiates your app from a static template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust TypeScript service function that processes [Insert Input] and returns a [Insert Output] with error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement the logic in /lib/services.ts and add unit tests for the primary function'

steps.title: Integrate Authentication and Security
steps.description: Implement industry-standard auth to prove you understand the basics of secure software development.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a secure authentication flow using NextAuth.js with GitHub and Google providers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'install next-auth and configure the API routes for secure user session management'

steps.title: Deploy and Polish
steps.description: A project isn't real until it's live. Deploy to Vercel and run performance audits.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment checklist for a production-ready Next.js app, focusing on SEO, accessibility, and performance optimization.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'run a lighthouse audit simulation and suggest optimizations for improving page load speed'

pro_tips: Treat your commit history like a diary; document the 'why' behind AI-generated code to show you understand the underlying engineering.
Focus on one 'hero' feature that solves a hard problem, rather than building five mediocre 'to-do' list apps.
Use Claude Code to write tests for everything; a project with 90% test coverage is more impressive than a flashy UI.
Always refactor AI-generated code to match your own naming conventions; it demonstrates mastery over the codebase.
Record a 60-second Loom video demo for every project; employers prefer watching a demo over reading README files.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, iterate on it by adding a complex feature like Stripe billing or real-time webhooks, then document the technical challenges in a blog post on Dev.to or Medium.
content.conversion_block: Don't let the barrier to entry stop you from becoming a world-class engineer. The tools are ready, the path is clear, and your portfolio is waiting to be built. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
